name: Ash Port Factors
summary: Harbor-facing brokers who move volcanic exports, ration incoming necessities, and negotiate ash-window shipping from Psanan.
motive: Keep Psanan’s dangerous export economy functioning despite ashfall, heat, and route volatility.
power_relations: Dependent on House authority and Queen’s Court sanction
Interacts with Shelk, Soreheim, and maritime buyers
visible_membership_base: Harbor clerks, dock crews, cargo negotiators, and bonded caravan coordinators.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: A short shipping season makes bribery, hoarding, and favoritism especially destabilizing.
